# Trained Models

This folder stores the serialized model files generated by `train.py`.

## Files (auto-generated, not committed to git)

| File | Description | Size (approx) |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| `content_model.pkl` | TF-IDF / BERT content-based model + similarity matrix | ~50–200 MB |
| `collab_model.pkl` | SVD + KNN collaborative filtering models | ~100–500 MB |

## How to generate these files

```bash
python train.py
```

These files are excluded from the repository via `.gitignore` because:
1. They are large binary files
2. They can be fully regenerated from the source data
3. They change every time the model is retrained

## Regenerate after cloning

After cloning the repo and setting up the dataset in `data/`, run:

```bash
python train.py
```
